note: UC-06 (confidentiality obligations & carve-outs). REAL doc: Director Confidentiality Agreement, Endo International plc / Sisitsky / TPG Global (EDGAR 2016). Facts grounded: Endo=Ireland plc, governing law=Pennsylvania, return-or-destroy on written request.

items.claim: Endo International plc is incorporated under the laws of Ireland
this Agreement is governed by the laws of the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania
upon written request the receiving party shall return or destroy the Confidential Information
this Agreement is governed by the laws of Ireland
items.note: jurisdiction-swap: Ireland is Endo's place of INCORPORATION; the GOVERNING LAW is Pennsylvania — a very real lawyer mistake

items.claim: TPG Global, LLC is incorporated under the laws of Ireland
items.note: entity-swap: Endo is the Irish entity, not TPG

items.claim: the receiving party must pay liquidated damages of one million dollars per breach
the Agreement grants TPG a license to Endo's patent portfolio
Section 47(b) obligates the Director to report all trades to the SEC within 24 hours
as held in Endo v. TPG Global (2018), director confidentiality agreements of this kind are void
